title: No More Charcoal
description: Smelt Wood Logs into Coal instead of Charcoal
body:
# No More Charcoal!
This Datapack makes it so you gain normal Coal when smelting Logs instead of Charcoal.

This will result in less Inventory clutter. Coal has many advantages to Charcoal:
- Coal will stack with other Coal in your Chests and in your Inventory
- You can craft Coal blocks to use even less storage
- Coal can be traded with Villagers while Charcoal cannot

![An image depicting Smelting Coal From Oak Logs in a Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d3f392fd45e2e30e47b7e42dd4e6fc050431cfb.png)

## 🛠️ Installation

### Datapack Installation Guide
Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world.

### Mod installation Guide
Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides.

## ❗Issues
Please report issues immediately on [my Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H).

## 📖 Further Reading
A Friend wrote an article on his blog: [Mindevice - No More Charcoal](https://www.mindevice.net/posts/no-more-charcoal)
